title: Credential allowed-domains restriction bypassed in declarative node HTTP requests (SSRF)
description: The RoutingNode in n8n's execution engine dispatches declarative-node HTTP requests with decrypted credentials but never enforces the credential's configured Allowed HTTP Request Domains restriction. Via the POST /rest/dynamic-node-parameters/options endpoint, any authenticated user with access to a credential could drive the n8n server into making attacker-chosen HTTP requests that include the credential, bypassing the host allow-list and exfiltrating credentials to arbitrary destinations (CWE-918 SSRF). The unguarded request dispatch is at the makeRequest call in routing-node.ts.
